schemaName: Pathfinder 2e Grandmaster Combat Loop Core Schema
systemIntent: Maximize action economy party utility, manipulate math modifiers (+1/-1), and minimize enemy actions via predictive tactical state modeling.
combatLoopSequence: Step 3: Tactical Target & Saving Throw Selection (Analysis Phase)
Step 5: End of Turn Optimization (Mitigation Phase)

step1_StatusAssessment.description: Scan character state for immediate life-threatening or accuracy-reducing conditions before choosing offensive options.

directives.condition: Has Persistent Damage (Burning, Bleeding, Acid) AND CurrentHP <= (PersistentDamageValue * 2)
directives.overrideAction: Spend 2 actions on Assisted Recovery / First Aid
directives.systemMath: Lowers end-of-turn Flat Check from DC 15 to DC 10
directives.reasoning: Critical life threat. Attacking while near death from ongoing damage is mathematically a failure state.

directives.overrideAction: Prioritize clearing condition (Retch for Sickened) or pivot to defensive/buff actions
directives.reasoning: A status penalty of -2 or worse heavily tanks accuracy. Do not waste high-value attacks or slotted spell slots during peak penalties.

step2_SpatiotemporalPositioning.description: Evaluate the 2D grid coordinates, hazard profiles, and tactical placement relative to enemies.

flankingEvasion.condition: Enemies are on opposite sides/corners (Agent is Off-Guard, -2 AC penalty)
flankingEvasion.priorityAction: Step 5 feet to an empty, safe adjacent square
flankingEvasion.reasoning: Breaks the flanking line instantly. Restores +2 AC without triggering Reactive Strikes (AoO).

flankingEvasion.condition: Completely surrounded, blocked by walls, or pinned in a pincer
flankingEvasion.priorityAction: Tumble Through (Acrobatics vs. Enemy Reflex DC)
flankingEvasion.reasoning: Enables movement directly through an enemy space to escape a lethal bottleneck.

hazardAndTerrainAvoidance.rule: Every square costs double movement (10 feet per square)
hazardAndTerrainAvoidance.logic: If (StrideDistance / 2) < DistanceToTarget, abort melee progression. Pivot to a ranged weapon, cast a spell, or ready an action.
Absolute pathing veto unless crossing guarantees an immediate enemy kill AND remaining HP exceeds the hazard damage.

step3_TacticalTargetSelection.description: Identify the enemy defense profile to maximize spell and skill success rates.

step4_ActionPacketExecution.description: Compose role packets + feat/archetype overlays, then level-band search to lock a 3-action budget. Never make a 3rd strike under normal MAP.

notes: L1–2: single primary packet. L3–6: top-K=3. L7+: beam-expand top-K=5.
Capability count ≥4 bumps search band one step.

action2.name: Strike
action2.intent: Maximize accuracy at 0 MAP to fish for a +10 Critical Success

action3.name: Press Strike or Raise a Shield
action3.intent: Apply iterative pressure or secure defense

action1.name: Courageous Anthem / Inspire Courage
action1.intent: Mandatory +1 global party attack/damage status buff

action2_3.name: Cast 2-Action Slotted Spell or Bon Mot + Cantrip
action2_3.intent: Control battlefield or drop enemy saving throws

action1.name: Flurry of Blows
action1.intent: Compress two attacks into a single action costing 0 and -5 MAP

action2_3.name: Stride / Step away
action2_3.intent: Move completely out of melee reach, forcing enemies to waste actions chasing

action1.name: Recall Knowledge
action1.intent: Identify target's lowest saving throw DC

action2_3.name: Cast 2-Action Spell
action2_3.intent: Target the identified weak save (Fortitude, Reflex, or Will)

step5_EndOfTurnMitigation.description: Spend the final remaining action of a turn maximizing defensive layers rather than making low-probability attacks.

options.condition: Melee character ending turn adjacent to mobile threats
options.reasoning: Moving flush against impassable geometry makes it physically impossible for enemies to establish a flank.

options.condition: Ending turn within line of sight of ranged enemies
options.reasoning: Secures a +2 circumstance bonus (Standard Cover) or a massive +4 bonus (Greater Cover) to AC.
Adds a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and unlocks the Shield Block reaction trigger.

step6_OffTurnReactionPreComputation.description: Pre-calculate specific reaction triggers to process instantaneously during the enemy's initiative turn.

triggers.name: Reactive Strike (AoO)
triggers.triggerCondition: Adjacent enemy utilizes a Move action, Manipulate action, or Ranged Attack
triggers.execution: Strike immediately at 0 MAP. Interrupts manipulate actions on a critical hit.

triggers.name: Shield Block
triggers.triggerCondition: Taking physical damage while shield is raised
triggers.execution: Trigger only if remaining damage after Shield Hardness prevents falling unconscious or entering the Dying state. Save shield durability against weak minion hits.
